Last updated: July 3, 2026

Terms of Service

These terms describe the basic rules for using MandarinPath. By using the service, you agree to use it responsibly and in accordance with these terms.

Use of the Service

MandarinPath provides tools for Chinese language learning, including speaking, reading, and writing practice. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for activity that occurs through your account.

Acceptable Use

Do not misuse the service, interfere with its operation, attempt unauthorized access, upload harmful content, or use MandarinPath in a way that violates applicable law or the rights of others.

Learning Feedback

MandarinPath may use automated systems to evaluate practice work and provide feedback. Feedback is intended for learning support and may not always be complete or error-free.

Changes and Availability

We may update, suspend, or discontinue parts of the service as MandarinPath evolves. We may also update these terms and will post the revised version on this page.

Contact

For questions about these terms, contact support@mandarinpath.com.

中 MandarinPath

Your AI-powered Chinese language tutor that makes learning both fun and productive. Focus on real-world skills with personalized speaking, reading, and writing practice.
